overview.productivity.title: Productivity
overview.productivity.subtitle: Hours, billable share and sign-off per employee.
overview.revenue.title: Revenue
overview.revenue.subtitle: Omzet from billable hours × the project's hourly rate.
overview.revenue.empty: No billable hours on rated projects yet this year.
overview.revenue.rate_hint: Hours only count towards revenue when they are billable and booked on a project with an hourly rate.
leave.title: Leave
leave.form.override_hint: Recorded against your name. Use it only when the schedule cannot express what was agreed.
leave.form.reapproval_warning: Saving this change returns the request to pending approval — a manager will need to approve it again.
leave.form.over_request: This is {hours} h more than the remaining balance — you can still submit; a manager decides.
leave.form.past_span: This request lies (partly) in the past.
leave.form.past_locked: This span lies in the past — you can't backdate leave yourself. Ask a manager to register it.
leave.form.past_backdate: This span lies in the past — you're registering backdated leave.
leave.form.times_hint: Leave a field empty to use the working day's own start or end.
leave.recurring.title: Rostered free days (ADV)
leave.recurring.hint: The pattern places pre-approved free days on the calendar right away — up to the contract's end date, or the planning horizon for open-ended contracts — and rolls forward monthly. Holidays and non-working days are skipped, the balance is never exceeded, and each day can be moved or cancelled individually.
leave.recurring.generated: Saved — {count} free days placed on the calendar.
leave.recurring.delete_confirm: Delete this pattern? Days already placed stay and can be cancelled individually.
leave.review.title: Review request
leave.bulk.cancel_confirm: Cancel the selected leave requests? The hours return to the balance.
leave.schedule.copy_to_others: Copy to the other working days
leave.balance.none: No leave balance yet — an administrator sets entitlements under Settings → Leave.
leave.requests.heading: My requests
leave.requests.cancel_confirm: Cancel this leave request? The hours return to the balance.
leave.widget.pending_empty: No leave requests waiting on you.
leave.team.title: Team leave
leave.team.over_balance: Exceeds the balance — approving leaves −{hours} h remaining this year.
auth.forgot_hint: Enter your email address and we'll send a reset link.
auth.forgot_sent: If that address exists, an email with a reset link is on its way.
auth.reset_success: Your password is set. You can sign in now.
auth.email.reset_body:
Hi {name},

A password reset was requested for your {brand} account. Set a new password via this link:
{link}

If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
auth.email.invite_body:
Hi {name},

You now have access to {brand}. Set your password via this link:
{link}

See you there!
errors.reset_token_invalid: This link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.
errors.password_too_short: The password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.password_too_long: The password is too long (max 128 characters).
errors.password_is_email: The password must not equal your email address.
auth.local_login_disabled: Password login is disabled. Sign in with your organization account.
auth.unknown_host: This address does not belong to any organization on this installation. Check the URL, or ask your administrator.
auth.org_suspended: This organization is suspended. Contact your administrator.
auth.two_factor_hint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.two_factor_backup_hint: Enter one of your backup codes. Each code works only once.
auth.two_factor_send_sms: Text a code to my phone
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.my_day.title: My Day
dashboard.my_day.no_tasks: No open tasks. Enjoy your day!
dashboard.open_by_group.title: Open tasks per project / client
dashboard.open_by_group.empty: No open tasks. All caught up!
dashboard.customize.title: Customize dashboard
dashboard.customize.hint: Choose which widgets you see and in which order. Managers can also save the layout as the team default.
dashboard.customize.hint_dnd: Tick widgets on or off here; drag the tiles themselves to rearrange. Managers set the team default under Settings → Dashboard.
dashboard.team_month.title: Team this month
dashboard.gallery.title: Add a widget
dashboard.gallery.hint: Browse the widgets that aren't on your dashboard yet and add one. Drag the tiles above to reorder.
dashboard.gallery.all_added: Every available widget is already on your dashboard.
dashboard.widget_desc.time.today: Your hours logged today and the running timer.
dashboard.widget_desc.time.team_month: The team's hours and revenue so far this month.
dashboard.widget_desc.tasks.my_open: The open tasks assigned to you, soonest due first.
dashboard.widget_desc.tasks.by_group: Open tasks grouped by project and client.
dashboard.widget_desc.leave.balance: Your remaining leave balance per type.
dashboard.widget_desc.leave.pending_appr: Leave requests waiting on your approval.
dashboard.widget_desc.interactions.pendi: Your matched emails awaiting review, across all clients.
companies.title: Clients
companies.name: Name
companies.empty_hint: Create your first client to get started.
companies.confirm_delete: Delete this client? This cannot be undone.
companies.status_hint: Switching to a status with a task template automatically creates its tasks.
contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.name: Name
contacts.empty_hint: Add your first contact to get started.
contacts.panel.title: Contacts
contacts.link_client_hint: You can attach this person to a client afterwards.
tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.empty_hint: Create your first task to get started.
tasks.delete_confirm: Delete this task? This cannot be undone.
tasks.field.title: Title
tasks.panel.title: Tasks
tasks.detail.delete_confirm: Delete this task, including its checklists and comments? This cannot be undone.
tasks.checklist.title: Checklists
tasks.checklist.delete_confirm: Delete this checklist and all its items?
tasks.comments.title: Comments
tasks.comments.delete_confirm: Delete this comment? This cannot be undone.
tasks.activity.title: Activity
tasks.activity.status_closed_with_intera: closed this task ({from} → {to}) with the contact moment “{subject}”
tasks.activity.recurrence_spawned: created this task from a recurring task
tasks.activity.template_applied: created this task from a template
tasks.recurrence.title: Repeat
tasks.recurrence.hint: After completion: the next task is created when you complete this one. On schedule: it is created automatically on the interval, even if this one is still open.
tasks.links.title: Links & attachments
tasks.links.empty: No links yet — attach briefs, docs or designs.
tasks.links.files_hint: Files are stored on this instance; a Google Drive integration follows in a later phase.
tasks.field.requires_interaction: Close only with a contact moment
tasks.field.requires_interaction_hint: This task can only reach a finished status once a logged contact moment is used to close it.
tasks.detail.due_reason_body: Moving the deadline from {from} to {to} — why?
tasks.detail.due_reason_hint: Extending a deadline asks for a reason and is logged.
tasks.statuses.requires_interaction_help: Closing into this status requires a contact moment
tasks.templates.name: Name
tasks.templates.requires_interaction_hin: Tasks from this item can only be closed with a contact moment.
tasks.templates.empty_hint: Create a template like “Client onboarding” and it can auto-create tasks when a client reaches a status.
tasks.templates.delete_confirm: Delete this template? Existing tasks are kept.
tasks.checklist.save_template_hint: Save this checklist to the shared template repository
tasks.checklist_templates.title: Checklist templates
tasks.checklist_templates.subtitle: Reusable checklists everyone can attach to a task.
tasks.checklist_templates.empty: No checklist templates yet — save one from a task or create one here.
tasks.checklist_templates.delete_confirm: Delete this checklist template? Checklists already on tasks are kept.
projects.title: Projects
projects.empty_hint: Create a project to plan work, budgets and to-dos for a client.
projects.panel.title: Projects
projects.field.name: Name
projects.logged_hint: Logged hours and billable value are shown once time tracking links to projects.
projects.cost_unrated: of which {hours} h by people without a rate — not priced in.
time.title: Time
time.timer.heading: Timer
time.timesheet.heading: Weekly timesheet
time.manual.heading: Add time
time.quick_create.company_hint: Created as an active client; details can be filled in later on the client page.
time.approved_locked_hint: Approved hours are locked — ask a manager to change them.
time.overview.title: Hours overview
time.overview.subtitle: Review, approve and invoice the team's hours.
time.delete_confirm: Delete this registration? This cannot be undone.
time.view.label: View
time.day_empty_hint: Add a registration to this day using the panel.
time.panel.title: Time
time.panel.empty: No hours logged in this period yet.
customfields.errors.invalid_datetime: Enter a valid date and time.
customfields.errors.pattern_mismatch: This value has an invalid format.
customfields.errors.out_of_range: This value is out of range.
impex.settings.title: Import & export
impex.settings.subtitle: Move data in and out as CSV — clients, contacts, projects, tasks, timesheets, subscriptions.
impex.settings.hint: Exports carry stable column headers, so a file re-imports into this workspace unchanged. Imports preview first and apply all-or-nothing; timesheet and task imports always create new records.
impex.entity.project_help: Upserts on the project name; the client column matches by name.
impex.entity.task_help: Import always creates new tasks; assignee matches by e-mail.
impex.entity.time_entry_help: Import creates entries on your own timesheet; approval status is export-only.
impex.entity.subscription_help: Upserts on the subscription name; a changed amount extends the price history.
impex.file_hint: Columns use the same keys as the CSV export — export once for a template. Existing records are matched and updated, new ones are created. Up to 2,000 rows per file; nothing is saved until you import.
impex.errors.invalid_file: This file could not be read as CSV (UTF-8 expected).
impex.errors.empty_file: The file contains no data rows.
impex.errors.too_many_rows: Too many rows: at most 2,000 data rows per import.
impex.errors.duplicate_in_file: Duplicate of an earlier row in this file.
impex.errors.ambiguous_match: Matches more than one existing record.
impex.errors.invalid_option: Not one of the allowed values.
settings.title: Settings
settings.modules.title: Modules
settings.modules.subtitle: Switch parts of the platform on or off for this workspace.
settings.modules.hint: Disabling a module hides it everywhere but keeps its data; switching it back on restores everything.
settings.modules.locked_hint: This module requires a license key. Install one under Settings → License, then enable it here.
settings.license.title: License
settings.license.subtitle: Extra modules require a license key. The core platform stays free; without a valid key, licensed modules are read-only after the grace period — data is never lost and export always works.
settings.license.bootstrap_until: Modules without a license become read-only on
settings.dashboard.title: Dashboard
settings.dashboard.subtitle: The default widget layout for everyone without a personal one.
settings.navigation.title: Navigation
settings.navigation.subtitle: The default sidebar order and visibility for everyone without a personal layout.
settings.navigation.empty: No module navigation items to arrange.
settings.account.nav_subtitle: Reorder or hide the sidebar items for yourself; your layout always wins over the team default.
settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.notifications.subtitle: Choose what reaches you, and when.
settings.notifications.channels_hint: Deliver notifications to Slack, Teams, Google Chat, e-mail or a webhook. Credentials are encrypted and never shown again.
settings.notifications.channel_url_hint: The URL embeds the secret and is stored encrypted. Webhooks pointing at private addresses are blocked.
settings.notifications.email.title: Email notifications
settings.notifications.email.subtitle: Have your notifications delivered by email too — right away, or bundled into a digest.
settings.notifications.email.transport_h: Requires an email provider under Settings → Email (set up by an administrator).
settings.notifications.kind_hint.email: Sends to this address through your email provider (Settings → Email).
settings.notifications.kind_hint.slack: In Slack: create an Incoming Webhook for the channel and paste its URL here.
settings.notifications.kind_hint.msteams: In Teams: add an Incoming Webhook connector to the channel and paste its URL here.
settings.notifications.kind_hint.gchat: In Google Chat: manage webhooks on the space and paste the webhook URL here.
settings.notifications.kind_hint.discord: In Discord: create a webhook under channel settings → Integrations and paste its URL here.
settings.notifications.kind_hint.telegra: Create a bot via @BotFather; the chat ID is the group or user the bot posts to.
settings.notifications.kind_hint.webhook: Every notification is POSTed to this URL as JSON. Private addresses are blocked.
settings.notifications.kind_hint.custom: For everything else Apprise supports (ntfy, Matrix, …) — the raw Apprise URL. The URL contains the secret and is stored encrypted.
settings.notification_defaults.title: Notification defaults
settings.notification_defaults.subtitle: What everyone inherits before they change it themselves.
settings.dashboard.hint: Employees can still arrange their own dashboard; this template applies until they do.
settings.account.title: My account
settings.account.subtitle: Manage your language, appearance and profile.
settings.account.language_help: Choose the language for your interface. It's saved to your account and follows you across devices.
settings.account.appearance_help: Choose light or dark, or match your device's setting.
settings.account.formatting_help: How dates and times are shown to you, independent of your language. Saved to your account and follows you across devices.
settings.account.avatar_help: Without your own photo your SSO profile picture is shown; otherwise your initials.
settings.account.email_help: Your email is used to sign in and can't be changed here.
settings.account.password_help: Choose a new password of at least 8 characters.
settings.account.api_keys_hint: Personal keys for scripts and automation. Each carries a subset of your own permissions and an expiry; if you're demoted, the key is too.
settings.account.api_key_once: Copy it now — it is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later.
settings.account.api_key_expiry_help: Leave empty for a key that never expires.
settings.account.two_factor_help: Protect your account with a second step at sign-in: a code from an authenticator app, plus backup codes for when your phone is out of reach.
settings.account.two_factor_scan: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (or enter the key manually), then enter the 6-digit code the app shows.
settings.account.two_factor_backup_once: Store these codes somewhere safe — they are shown only once. Each code lets you sign in once when your authenticator is unavailable.
settings.account.two_factor_backup_regen: Replaces every remaining code. Enter a current code from your authenticator app to confirm.
settings.account.two_factor_disable_help: Enter your password to turn off two-factor authentication.
settings.account.two_factor_sms_help: Also receive sign-in codes by text message, as a fallback for your authenticator app.
settings.account.two_factor_sms_enabled: Sign-in codes can be texted to {phone}.
settings.account.two_factor_sms_pending: Enter the code we texted to {phone}.
settings.account.email_change_help: Your email is your sign-in name. Changing it requires your current password; you sign in with the new address right away.
settings.account.email_changed: Your email address has been changed.
settings.account.email_managed_by_sso: Your email is managed by your organization's sign-in provider.
settings.service_accounts.title: Service accounts
settings.service_accounts.subtitle: API access for automation (n8n, webhooks, MCP) that keeps working when people leave.
settings.service_accounts.name: Name
settings.service_accounts.empty: No service accounts yet. Create one to give automation its own API access, separate from any person's account.
settings.service_accounts.delete_confirm: Delete this service account? All of its keys stop working immediately.
settings.service_accounts.revoke_confirm: Revoke this key? Anything still using it loses access immediately.
settings.branding.domain.title: Custom domain
settings.branding.domain.subtitle: Serve this organization on your own domain. You prove control via a DNS TXT record before it becomes active.
settings.branding.domain.verified_now: Domain verified — it now resolves to this organization.
settings.branding.domain.txt_instruction: Create this DNS TXT record, wait for it to propagate, then verify:
settings.custom_fields.title: Custom fields
settings.custom_fields.subtitle: Define your own typed fields on companies, contacts and more.
settings.custom_fields.empty: No custom fields for this entity type yet.
settings.custom_fields.label: Label
settings.custom_fields.key_hint: Lowercase, letters/digits/underscores. Cannot be changed later.
settings.custom_fields.key_locked: The key is fixed after creation.
settings.custom_fields.type_locked: The type is fixed after creation.
settings.custom_fields.label_optional: Labels are optional — the key is shown when a label is empty.
settings.custom_fields.delete_confirm: Delete this custom field? Stored values for it are lost.
settings.branding.title: Branding
settings.branding.subtitle: Your logo, colors and brand name — applied across the whole app.
settings.branding.show_brand_name: Show the brand name next to the logo
settings.branding.upload_help: Upload an image, or point to a hosted URL — a chosen file replaces the URL.
settings.branding.app_icon_help: A square image of at least 512×512 px (PNG/JPEG/WebP). Used for the home-screen icon when the app is installed; the favicon stays the browser-tab icon.
settings.branding.timezone_help: Event times are shown in this timezone for everyone in this workspace.
settings.branding.currency_help: All amounts are shown in this currency for everyone in this workspace.
settings.branding.tab_title_help: Template with {pageToken} (the page name, required) and {brandToken}. Leave empty for the default.
settings.branding.tab_title_invalid: The template must contain {pageToken} and may only use {pageToken} and {brandToken}.
settings.branding.hint: Changes apply on the next page load, for everyone in this workspace.
settings.branding.domain.cname_instructi: Also point the domain itself at the platform so traffic (and the automatic TLS certificate) can reach it:
settings.task_templates.title: Task templates
settings.task_templates.subtitle: Reusable task lists, e.g. client onboarding — applied manually or on a status change.
settings.task_labels.title: Task labels
settings.task_labels.subtitle: Colored labels to organize tasks across clients and projects.
settings.task_labels.delete_confirm: Delete this label? It is removed from all tasks.
settings.task_statuses.title: Task statuses
settings.task_statuses.subtitle: The columns your task board groups by — rename, recolor, reorder or add your own.
settings.task_statuses.delete_confirm: Delete this status? Tasks must be moved out of it first.
settings.users.title: Team & users
settings.users.subtitle: Invite colleagues, set their role, or revoke access.
settings.users.name: Name
settings.users.invited_hint: Without the email, the new user sets a password via “Forgot password”.
settings.users.send_invite_email: Send an invitation email with a set-password link
settings.users.invite_email_failed: The invitation was created, but the email could not be sent.
settings.leave.title: Leave
settings.leave.subtitle: Leave types, the default work schedule, public holidays and yearly entitlements
settings.automation.title: Automation
settings.automation.subtitle: Rules that react to events: conditions, actions and the run log
settings.leave.schedule_hint: The week every employee without their own schedule works. Change someone's own schedule under Settings → Users.
settings.leave.holidays_hint: A holiday on a scheduled working day costs no leave hours. Not every holiday is a day off everywhere — switch off the ones you work.
settings.leave.holidays_empty: No holidays for this year yet.
settings.leave.imported: {created} added, {updated} moved, {skipped} left as they were.
settings.leave.holiday_delete_confirm: Delete this holiday? Deactivating it keeps it out of every calculation and survives the next import.
settings.leave.self_approval: Approvers may approve and edit their own leave
settings.leave.self_approval_hint: Off: an approver's own request goes to the other approvers, and their own past is locked like everyone else's. An organization with a single approver is always allowed to self-manage. On: approvers manage their own leave directly.
settings.leave.recurring_horizon_hint: How far ahead recurring free days are placed for someone on an open-ended contract. A fixed-term contract is always filled to its end date. The monthly run keeps extending the window.
settings.leave.default_rate_hint: The rate used for anyone without a personal rate (Settings → Users). Leave empty for no default.
settings.leave.contract_hours_derived: Contract hours follow from the employee's work schedule.
settings.leave.delete_confirm: Delete this leave type? Types with requests can only be deactivated.
settings.leave.generate_hint: Creates missing entitlements from each type's default weeks × contract hours
settings.system.title: System information
settings.system.subtitle: Version, updates and the health of this installation.
settings.system.unavailable: Could not read the system information.
settings.system.dev_build: Development build — not a released image.
settings.system.migrations_up_to_date: The database schema is up to date.
settings.system.migrations_pending: Migrations are pending — the schema is behind this release.
settings.system.up_to_date: You are running the latest release.
settings.system.update_disabled: The update check is switched off.
settings.system.update_disabled_help: Set SCHAKL_UPDATE_CHECK_ENABLED=true to switch it back on.
settings.system.update_dev_build: Update checks are skipped on a development build.
settings.system.diagnostics_help: Copy this into a bug report.
errors.upload_type: This file type is not allowed.
errors.invalid_sort: You can't sort by that column.
errors.file_bytes_missing: This file's record exists but its contents are missing from storage. This usually means the file store and database have drifted apart — check that the API and worker share the same storage volume.
errors.storage_backend_unavailable: This file was stored in a storage backend that is not configured on this instance. Restore the object-storage configuration (SCHAKL_STORAGE_S3_*) to make it reachable again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this.
errors.demo_blocked: This action is disabled in the demo.
demo.banner: This is a live demo — anyone can edit, and all data resets every {minutes} minutes.
errors.status_in_use: This status still has tasks in it — move or delete them first.
errors.status_last: This is the last status — a task needs at least one to be in.
errors.approved_locked: These hours are approved and locked. A manager can change or unapprove them.
errors.due_reason_required: Give a reason for moving the deadline.
errors.last_owner: You can't remove or demote the last owner.
errors.last_role_manager: This is the last role that can manage roles — the organisation would lock itself out.
errors.license_expired: The license for this module has expired — it is read-only until a new license key is installed.
errors.license_invalid: That is not a valid license key.
errors.license_required: This module requires a license. Install a license key under Settings → License.
errors.system_role_immutable: This is a system role: its key cannot change, it cannot be deleted, and the owner role's permissions are fixed.
errors.role_required: Every user must keep at least one role.
errors.cannot_remove_self: You can't remove your own membership.
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.leave_overlap: This period overlaps another leave request.
errors.leave_self_approval: You can't approve your own leave — another approver has to decide.
errors.leave_recurring_needs_manager: Recurring days for this leave type can only be planned by a manager.
errors.leave_decided: This request has already been decided.
errors.leave_type_in_use: This leave type is in use and can only be deactivated.
errors.leave_end_before_start: The end date is before the start date.
errors.leave_no_working_hours: This period contains no scheduled working hours.
errors.leave_past_locked: Leave in the past can only be registered or changed by a manager.
errors.leave_contract_overlap: This contract period overlaps another for the same employee.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Slow down and try again shortly.
errors.apikey_expiry_past: The expiry date must be in the future.
errors.apikey_expiry_too_far: The expiry date is too far ahead. Keys last at most a year.
errors.apikey_unknown_scope: This scope is not a known permission.
errors.apikey_scope_exceeds_grants: A key cannot grant more than you hold yourself.
errors.notification_channel_blocked: This URL points at a blocked (private or local) address.
errors.notification_channel_input: This doesn't look like this provider's URL — copy it from the provider and paste it whole.
errors.email_not_configured: Email is not configured yet (Settings → Email).
errors.sso_not_configured: Single sign-on is not set up for this organization.
errors.sso_test_required: Run a successful connection test before requiring single sign-on.
errors.leave_end_time_before_start: The end time is not after the start time.
errors.leave_holiday_exists: There is already a holiday on that date.
errors.leave_schedule_day_invalid: The end of the working day is not after its start.
errors.leave_schedule_break_invalid: The end of the break is not after its start.
errors.leave_schedule_break_outside: A break must fall inside the working day.
errors.leave_schedule_breaks_overlap: Breaks may not overlap each other.
errors.leave_schedule_day_empty: The breaks take up the whole working day.
errors.leave_schedule_empty: Pick at least one working day.
errors.invalid_assignee: That employee is not a member of this workspace.
errors.multiple_primary_assignees: Only one assignee can be the responsible one.
errors.unknown_host: Unknown address: no organization is served on this hostname.
errors.setup_already_done: This installation is already set up.
errors.slug_taken: This slug is already in use.
errors.invalid_slug: Not a valid slug (lowercase letters, digits, hyphens; some names are reserved).
errors.invalid_domain: Not a valid domain, or the domain is served by this installation itself.
errors.domain_taken: This domain is already claimed by another organization.
errors.domain_verification_failed: Verification failed: the DNS TXT record was not found (yet).
errors.export_required: Export the organization's data first — destruction requires an export taken after deletion.
errors.org_not_deleted: Delete the organization first before destroying it permanently.
errors.confirm_slug: The confirmation does not match the slug.
errors.import_invalid: This is not a valid export file.
errors.import_schema_mismatch: The export comes from a different application version. Align versions first, then retry.
errors.automation_invalid_conditions: This is not a valid condition tree.
errors.automation_action_config_invalid: The action's configuration is incomplete or invalid.
errors.automation_webhook_invalid_url: The webhook URL must start with http:// or https://.
errors.automation_webhook_private_target: The webhook target resolves to a private address and was refused.
errors.automation_webhook_not_confirmed: The webhook did not confirm the delivery.
errors.automation_depth_exceeded: Skipped: caused by a chain of 3 automations (loop protection).
errors.automation_rule_deleted: The rule was deleted before this run executed.
automation.title: Automation
automation.subtitle: When something happens, check conditions and run actions — every firing is logged.
automation.name: Name
automation.trigger_hint: The event this rule listens for.
automation.delete_confirm: Delete this rule? Its run history is kept.
automation.conditions_hint: Checked against the event and the record it is about. No conditions = the rule always fires.
automation.conditions_mode_any: At least one condition must match
automation.condition_value_hint: For “is one of”, separate values with commas.
automation.advanced_json_hint: For nested all/any trees. While enabled, this JSON replaces the rows above.
automation.actions_hint: Executed in order by the background worker. A failing action stops the chain and fails the run.
automation.actions_empty: No actions — the rule will match and log, but do nothing.
automation.config.title: Task title
automation.config.company_hint: Applied to the client the rule fired on, unless configured otherwise.
automation.config.confirm_hint: The run fails unless the endpoint answers 2xx and does not reply {"ok": false}.
automation.trigger.website.uptime_toggle: Uptime monitoring for a website is switched on or off
automation.dry_run_hint: Test the conditions against an existing record. Nothing is executed.
automation.dry_run_matched: Conditions match — these actions would fire: {actions}
automation.dry_run_matched_none: Conditions match, but the rule has no actions yet.
automation.dry_run_not_matched: Conditions do not match this record.
automation.dry_run_no_snapshot: No record with this id was found; only the event payload was evaluated.
automation.runs_subtitle: Every rule firing, with its steps and errors.
setup.title: Set up your installation
setup.subtitle: One step and you're live: create your organization and the owner account.
setup.slug_hint: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens. Part of your address and hard to change later.
setup.modules_hint: What this installation is used for — change any time under Settings.
setup.owner_hint: This account manages the organization and this installation.
instance.title: Instance
instance.subtitle: Organizations on this installation — lifecycle, modules and data.
instance.owner_email_hint: Gets the owner role; sets a password via password reset.
instance.reslug_hint: Changing the slug changes the organization's address.
instance.impersonate_hint: Time-boxed, audited, and visible to everyone via a banner.
instance.import_hint: Paste the JSON of a previously exported organization. Domains are not carried over and must be verified again.
instance.suspend_confirm: Suspend {name}? Members can no longer sign in until reactivation.
instance.soft_delete_confirm: Delete {name}? The organization stops resolving but its data is kept until it is destroyed permanently.
instance.purge_hint: Removes every row of this organization. Requires an export taken after deletion — that export is the only copy that remains.

notifications.settings.override_count: {count} of these are your own settings; the rest are inherited.
notifications.settings.due_soon_hint: How many days before a deadline counts as “due soon”.
notifications.settings.quiet_hint: Saved, but not applied yet: in-app notifications never interrupt, so quiet hours only take effect once email and chat delivery arrive.

notifications.event_label.task.unassigne: A task is taken away from me

settings.roles.title: Roles
settings.roles.subtitle: Define who may do what. A user's permissions are the union of every role they hold.
settings.roles.key_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, - and _. It cannot be changed later.
settings.roles.system_hint: A system role cannot be deleted and its key never changes, but its permissions are yours to set.
settings.roles.owner_locked: The owner always holds every permission. That is what keeps a mistake made elsewhere fixable.
settings.roles.delete_confirm: Delete this role? Everyone who holds it loses its permissions.
settings.users.system_role_hint: Everyone keeps at least one system role this release.
settings.users.schedule_inherited_hint: This employee works the default schedule of {hours} h a week.
settings.users.schedule_stale_hours: Contract hours are {hours} h/week, but this person has no schedule of their own — leave is measured against the {inherited} h default.
settings.users.rate_hint: Used to compute value and remaining budget per employee. Leave empty for no rate.
settings.users.contract_empty: No employment contract yet — leave falls back to scheduled hours.
settings.users.contract_hint: Contract hours are the legal number (e.g. 38), distinct from the scheduled week. The gap accrues as rostered days off (ADV). A changed contract is a new row, not an edit.
settings.users.reset_two_factor_confirm: Reset two-factor authentication for this member? Their account returns to password-only sign-in until they set it up again. Do this only for someone who lost access to their codes.
settings.providers.title: Providers
settings.providers.subtitle: Email, DNS, registrar and hosting providers you work with.
settings.email.title: Email
settings.email.subtitle: Outgoing email: your own SMTP server or the Brevo, SendGrid or SMTP2GO API.
settings.email.not_configured: Not configured yet — outgoing email stays off until a provider is set up.
settings.email.test_ok: Test email sent — check your inbox.
settings.email.templates.title: Email templates
settings.email.templates.subtitle: Customise the subject and HTML of the invite and password-reset emails, per language. Leave a field empty to use the built-in default.
settings.email.templates.no_transport: Configure an email transport above to send test emails; templates still save.
settings.email.templates.subject: Subject
settings.email.templates.body_placeholde: Leave empty to use the built-in default.
settings.email.delete_confirm: Remove the email configuration? Outgoing email will be off afterwards.
settings.email.instance_hint: Mail is sent from the platform's own address, displayed with your organization's name.
settings.sso.title: Single sign-on

settings.sso.enabled_hint: Shows the SSO button on the sign-in page.
settings.sso.name: Display name

settings.sso.secret_stored: Stored — leave empty to keep it
settings.sso.auto_provision: Create a membership on first sign-in
settings.sso.auto_provision_hint: Off: only people who already have access can sign in through SSO.
settings.sso.callback_url_hint: Register exactly this address as the redirect URI at your identity provider.
settings.sso.enforced_hint: Turns password login off for everyone in this organization. Can only be switched on after a successful connection test, and any change to the connection requires a new test.
settings.sso.weak_key_warning: The encryption key is still the shipped default. Set SCHAKL_SECRET_KEY (or SCHAKL_ENCRYPTION_KEY) before storing a client secret in production.
settings.providers.name: Name
settings.providers.delete_confirm: Delete this provider? It is removed from anything referencing it.

settings.interaction_kinds.key_hint: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores. Cannot be changed later.

settings.ai.key_stored: A key is stored; leave empty to keep it

settings.ai.house_style_hint: Prepended to every writing prompt: your agency's tone of voice, written once.
settings.ai.budget_hint: Soft cap per calendar month; empty means unlimited.
settings.ai.test_failed_generic: Test failed: the provider returned no usable response.
settings.ai.budget_warning: Over 80% of the monthly budget has been used.

interactions.body_loading: The full message is being retrieved.

errors.interactions_kind_not_manual: Emails are logged automatically and cannot be added by hand.
errors.interactions_kind_protected: This kind is system-owned: rename it if you like, but it cannot be removed or deactivated.
errors.interactions_kind_in_use: This kind is in use by logged interactions. Deactivate it instead.

settings.google.title: Google Workspace

settings.google.client_secret_hint: Stored encrypted; leave empty to keep the current secret.
settings.google.env_fallback_hint: The server environment already provides a client; values here override it.

settings.google.calendar_enabled_hint: Google Calendar events in the Agenda, and approved leave pushed to Google Calendar.
settings.google.drive_enabled_hint: Client folders in the shared drive, file browsing and attachments.
settings.google.gmail_enabled_hint: Emails matched to clients on the interactions timeline. Each employee opts their own mailbox in.
settings.google.template_folder_hint: New client folders copy this folder's structure. Empty: an empty folder is created.
settings.google.automation_connection_hi: Background work, such as creating client folders, uses this connected account.

settings.google.approval_mode_approval_r: Owner approves before the content is logged
settings.google.thread_followup_inherit_: Inherit the mapping, still ask for approval
Inherit the mapping and log immediately
google.account.title: Google account
google.account.hint: Connect your Google account for the calendar, files and email logging. You can disconnect at any time.
google.account.include_gmail_hint: Only emails matched to a known contact are logged, and you approve each one first.
google.account.reconnect_hint: The connection stopped working. Reconnect to resume syncing.

google.account.not_configured: The Google integration has not been configured by an administrator yet.
google.account.gmail_sync: Log my email to the CRM
google.account.gmail_sync_hint: Incoming and sent emails that match a known contact appear on the client timeline after your approval.
google.account.gmail_excluded_label_hint: Messages carrying this label are never logged.
google.account.disconnect_message: Syncing stops and the stored access is revoked. Already logged items remain.

errors.google_not_configured: The Google integration is not configured.
errors.google_connection_error: The Google connection is not working. Reconnect your account.
errors.google_no_refresh_token: Google did not issue a refresh token. Disconnect the app at myaccount.google.com and connect again.

google.drive.unlink_message: Only the link to this record is removed. The file itself stays untouched in Google Drive.

google.drive.disabled: Drive is not enabled for this workspace.

errors.google_drive_no_folder: No parent folder for client folders has been configured.
errors.google_drive_unavailable: Drive is unavailable right now. Try again.

invoicing.from_time.empty: No unbilled hours for this client.

settings.invoicing.title: Invoicing
settings.invoicing.subtitle: Company details, VAT rates, templates, numbering and reminders
settings.invoicing.seller_hint: Printed on every document and used for UBL export.
settings.invoicing.name: Name

settings.invoicing.ledger_code_hint: Optional: the VAT or ledger code your accounting package expects.
settings.invoicing.delete_rate_confirm: Delete this rate? Existing documents keep their own copy of it.

settings.invoicing.format_hint: Building blocks between curly braces: {tokens}. Example: {example}
settings.invoicing.prices_include_tax_hi: Default for new documents; each document can deviate.
settings.invoicing.reminders_hint: Checked daily: mails the client at the set days past due, at most once per step. Requires a configured email transport.
settings.invoicing.accounting_hint: Download issued invoices as UBL 2.1 and import them into Exact Online, SnelStart, Moneybird or e-Boekhouden. Live connections plug into the same seam later.
activity.action.credited: created a credit note for this
activity.action.reminder_failed: could not send a payment reminder ({reason})
invoicing.email.invoice_body:
Dear {company},

Please find invoice {number} for {total}. The due date is {due_date}.

Kind regards,
{brand}
invoicing.email.quote_body:
Dear {company},

Please find quote {number} for {total}, valid until {valid_until}.

Kind regards,
{brand}
invoicing.email.reminder_body:
Dear {company},

According to our records invoice {number} has not been paid yet ({outstanding} outstanding). It was due on {due_date}, {days} days ago.

If you have already paid, please disregard this message.

Kind regards,
{brand}
errors.invoicing.invalid_number_format: The number format must contain the seq token exactly once (between curly braces).
errors.invoicing.locked: This document has been issued; amounts can no longer change. Create a credit note to correct it.
errors.invoicing.not_draft: Only drafts can be deleted; cancel an issued invoice instead.
errors.invoicing.no_lines: Add at least one line first.
errors.invoicing.seller_incomplete: Fill in your company details first (Settings, Invoicing).
errors.invoicing.wrong_status: This action is not available in the document's current status.
errors.invoicing.no_recipient: No email address known for this client.
errors.invoicing.email_failed: Sending failed; check the email settings.
errors.invoicing.no_unbilled: No unbilled hours for this selection.
errors.invoicing.number_exhausted: Could not allocate a free number; check the numbering settings.
